title: Wave promotion audit record (Research Governance v0.1, Autoresearch MVP-0.5.6, v0.4.2 Track C4)
description: Append-only record written every time AUTORESEARCH_PROMOTION_FORCE is consumed at coordinator startup.  Each record documents WHO forced the promotion, WHEN, AT WHAT GIT COMMIT, and WHICH automatic requirements were unmet.  scripts/check.sh Step 12.k asserts this file is empty in CI runs (or contains only test-marked entries).

forced_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at the moment AUTORESEARCH_PROMOTION_FORCE was consumed.

target_wave.description: Wave number the operator forced the coordinator to start at.

coordinator_git_commit.description: Lower-case hex of HEAD at the moment of override.  Empty string only if `git rev-parse HEAD` could not be resolved.

unmet_reasons.description: List of requirement keys + diagnostics that the promotion_evaluator could not auto-satisfy.  Empty list is unusual: it means the evaluator said the wave WAS unlocked yet the operator still set FORCE; record kept regardless.

operator_note.description: Free-form reason supplied by the operator (via env var AUTORESEARCH_PROMOTION_FORCE_NOTE).  Empty string is allowed but discouraged.
